articles.title: What is Amorim doing these days? Have you looked at the very tough calendar? If I were Allegri I would behave like this...
articles.summary: There's no point in beating around the bush: the new season is born amidst the most widespread skepticism and the most accentuated uncertainties for a couple of good reasons.
